large_box.description:
This is the big one! 
Store all your vials in one case.

Holds:
 - 54x 3ml Vials

Colour Options:
Each componet can be customized to a colour of choice.
 - Latches
 - Lid / Base
 - Insert

Surfaces:
 - Carbon Fibre Look
 - Textured

mixed_box.description:
Medium-sized rugged case that fits nicely into the fridge.

Holds:
 - 8x 3ml Vials
 - 6x 10ml Vials

Colour Options:
Each componet can be customized to a colour of choice.
 - Latches
 - Lid / Base
 - Insert

Surfaces:
 - Carbon Fibre Look
 - Textured
